plugin.name: ZombieMUD_Core_Lite
plugin.author: Codex
plugin.purpose: Checks, loads, and reloads a small ZombieMUD plugin set
plugin.description:
ZombieMUD Core Lite
This lightweight core manages only: Message_Router Combat_Manager Know_Your_Audience simplestepper
Useful commands: zlite - show help zlite status - show plugin health and common settings zlite plugins check - show missing or disabled lite plugins zlite plugins load - try to load or enable the lite plugin set zlite reload - reload all lite plugins zlite reload all - reload all lite plugins zlite reload list - show reload targets

muclient.script:
require "checkplugin"
local MESSAGE_ID = "cb84a526b476f69f403519da" local COMBAT_ID = "a1b2c3d4e5f6a7b8c9d0e1f4" local AUDIENCE_ID = "a1b2c3d4e5f6a7b8c9d0e1f5" local STEPPER_ID = "999456123456123456123456"
local plugin_order = { { key = "messages", id = MESSAGE_ID, name = "Message_Router" }, { key = "combat", id = COMBAT_ID, name = "Combat_Manager" }, { key = "audience", id = AUDIENCE_ID, name = "Know_Your_Audience" }, { key = "stepper", id = STEPPER_ID, name = "simplestepper" }, }
local reload_aliases = { [""] = "all", all = "all", message = "messages", messages = "messages", msg = "messages", router = "messages", combat = "combat", combat_manager = "combat", know = "audience", kya = "audience", audience = "audience", know_your_audience = "audience", simple = "stepper", stepper = "stepper", simplestepper = "stepper", }
local function trim(text) return (text or ""):gsub("^%s+", ""):gsub("%s+$", "") end
local function plugin_by_key(key) for _, plugin in ipairs(plugin_order) do if plugin.key == key then return plugin end end return nil end
local function short_status(id) if not IsPluginInstalled(id) then return "missing" end if not GetPluginInfo(id, 17) then return "disabled" end return "enabled" end
local function yes_no(value) if value == "1" or value == "true" or value == true then return "on" end return "off" end
local function plugin_var(id, name, default) local ok, value = pcall(GetPluginVariable, id, name) if ok and value ~= nil and value ~= "" then return value end return default end
local function visible_state(window_id) if not WindowInfo(window_id, 1) then return "not created yet" end return WindowInfo(window_id, 5) and "visible" or "hidden" end
local function setting_line(label, value) ColourNote("khaki", "", " " .. label .. ": " .. tostring(value)) end
local function command_line(command, description) ColourNote("khaki", "", " " .. command .. " - " .. description) end
local function print_help_group(title, lines) ColourNote("paleturquoise", "", title) for _, line in ipairs(lines) do command_line(line[1], line[2]) end end
local function load_plugins() for _, plugin in ipairs(plugin_order) do do_plugin_check_now(plugin.id, plugin.name) end end
local function print_plugin_status(show_ok) local issues = 0 for _, plugin in ipairs(plugin_order) do local status = short_status(plugin.id) if status == "enabled" then if show_ok then ColourNote("darkseagreen", "", " OK: " .. plugin.name .. " is loaded and enabled.") end else issues = issues + 1 ColourNote("yellow", "", " " .. plugin.name .. " is " .. status .. ".") end end return issues end
local function reload_one(plugin) if not IsPluginInstalled(plugin.id) then ColourNote("yellow", "", " skipped: " .. plugin.name .. " is not loaded. Try 'zlite plugins load'.") return false end
if not GetPluginInfo(plugin.id, 17) then EnablePlugin(plugin.id, true) end
local ok, result = pcall(ReloadPlugin, plugin.id) if ok and result == 0 then ColourNote("lime", "", " OK: " .. plugin.name .. " reloaded.") return true end
if ok then if result == 30030 then local loaded_path = (GetPluginInfo(plugin.id, 20) or "") .. (GetPluginInfo(plugin.id, 6) or plugin.name .. ".xml") local core_path = (GetPluginInfo(GetPluginID(), 20) or "") .. plugin.name .. ".xml" ColourNote("red", "", " problem: " .. plugin.name .. " reload file was not found.") ColourNote("yellow", "", " MUSHclient tried to reload: " .. loaded_path) ColourNote("yellow", "", " Core Lite expects a copy at: " .. core_path) ColourNote("cyan", "", " Restore the XML file, then run 'zlite reload " .. plugin.key .. "'.") else ColourNote("red", "", " problem: " .. plugin.name .. " reload returned code " .. tostring(result) .. ".") end else ColourNote("red", "", " problem: " .. plugin.name .. " reload failed: " .. tostring(result)) end return false end
local function print_reload_targets() print("") ColourNote("lime", "", "ZombieMUD Core Lite reload targets") print_help_group("Targets:", { { "zlite reload", "reload all lite plugins" }, { "zlite reload all", "reload all lite plugins" }, { "zlite reload messages", "reload Message Router" }, { "zlite reload combat", "reload Combat Manager" }, { "zlite reload audience", "reload Know Your Audience" }, { "zlite reload stepper", "reload SimpleStepper" }, }) print("") end
function zlite_help_alias() print("") ColourNote("lime", "", "ZombieMUD Core Lite") print_help_group("Core Lite:", { { "zlite status", "show the health of the lite plugin set" }, { "zlite plugins check", "show missing or disabled lite plugins" }, { "zlite plugins load", "try to load or enable the lite plugin set" }, { "zlite reload", "reload all lite plugins without closing the world" }, { "zlite reload all", "reload all lite plugins" }, { "zlite reload list", "show reload targets" }, { "zlite sounds background", "toggle sounds while MUSHclient is not focused" }, }) print_help_group("Managed plugin commands:", { { "msgwin", "show or hide message windows" }, { "msgsize both 800 20", "resize message windows" }, { "msglog on/off", "turn message logging on or off" }, { "msglogpath", "show the current message log folder" }, { "msgcopylog tells 100", "copy recent message history to clipboard" }, { "msgbell on/off", "turn tell bell on or off" }, { "msgtimestamp", "show or change message-window timestamps" }, { "msgchannels", "show channel routing overrides" }, { "cmhelp", "show Combat Manager commands" }, { "cmstatus", "show Combat Manager status" }, { "corpsemode <mode>", "set corpse handling; use off to disable" }, { "corpsemode list", "show corpse handling modes" }, { "cmquiet on/off", "hide or show routine debug notes" }, { "vulnstatus", "show active vulnerability timers" }, { "vulnclear", "clear active vulnerability timers" }, { "vulntime 27", "set vulnerability timer duration in seconds" }, { "rounds / roundreset", "show or reset combat round counter" }, { "docorpse", "manually run the current corpse mode" }, { "- <path> / . / ..", "load and step through SimpleStepper paths" }, }) ColourNote("khaki", "", " Know Your Audience has no command alias; it watches the spell output automatically.") print("") end
function zlite_status_alias() print("") ColourNote("lime", "", "ZombieMUD Core Lite status") ColourNote("paleturquoise", "", "Plugins:") print_plugin_status(true)
ColourNote("paleturquoise", "", "Common settings:") setting_line("Sounds in background", GetOption("play_sounds_in_background") == 1 and "on" or "off") if IsPluginInstalled(MESSAGE_ID) then setting_line("Message logging", yes_no(plugin_var(MESSAGE_ID, "log_messages", "1"))) setting_line("Tell bell", yes_no(plugin_var(MESSAGE_ID, "bell_on_tell", "0"))) setting_line("Timestamps", plugin_var(MESSAGE_ID, "timestamp_format", "[%H:%M:%S] ")) setting_line("Channels window", visible_state("msg_router_channels_" .. MESSAGE_ID)) setting_line("Tells window", visible_state("msg_router_tells_" .. MESSAGE_ID)) end if IsPluginInstalled(COMBAT_ID) then setting_line("Corpse mode", plugin_var(COMBAT_ID, "corpse_mode", "(default)")) setting_line("Combat quiet mode", yes_no(plugin_var(COMBAT_ID, "quiet_mode", "0"))) setting_line("Combat vuln duration", plugin_var(COMBAT_ID, "vuln_duration", "27") .. " seconds") end ColourNote("cyan", "", "Type 'zlite' for Lite commands.") print("") end
function zlite_check_alias() print("") ColourNote("paleturquoise", "", "ZombieMUD Core Lite plugins:") local issues = print_plugin_status(true) if issues == 0 then ColourNote("lime", "", "Core Lite plugins look good.") else ColourNote("yellow", "", "Found " .. issues .. " issue(s). Type 'zlite plugins load' to try fixing them.") end print("") end
function zlite_load_alias() ColourNote("cyan", "", "Checking ZombieMUD Core Lite plugins...") load_plugins() zlite_check_alias() end
function zlite_reload_alias(name, line, wildcards) local requested = trim(wildcards[1] or ""):lower():gsub("%s+", "_") local target = reload_aliases[requested] or requested
if target == "help" or target == "list" or target == "targets" then print_reload_targets() return end
print("") ColourNote("cyan", "", "Reloading ZombieMUD Core Lite target: " .. (requested ~= "" and requested or "all")) local reloaded = 0 if target == "all" then for _, plugin in ipairs(plugin_order) do if reload_one(plugin) then reloaded = reloaded + 1 end end else local plugin = plugin_by_key(target) if not plugin then ColourNote("yellow", "", "Unknown reload target: " .. target) ColourNote("cyan", "", "Type 'zlite reload list' to see valid reload targets.") print("") return end if reload_one(plugin) then reloaded = reloaded + 1 end end
if reloaded > 0 then ColourNote("lime", "", "Reload complete. Type 'zlite status' if you want to check the set.") else ColourNote("yellow", "", "No plugins were reloaded.") end print("") end
function zlite_toggle_background_sounds() if GetOption("play_sounds_in_background") == 0 then SetOption("play_sounds_in_background", 1) ColourNote("lime", "", "Sounds will keep playing when MUSHclient is in the background.") else SetOption("play_sounds_in_background", 0) ColourNote("yellow", "", "Sounds will only play while MUSHclient is active.") end end
function OnPluginListChanged() load_plugins() end
function OnPluginInstall() load_plugins() ColourNote("cyan", "", "ZombieMUD Core Lite loaded. Type 'zlite' for commands or 'zlite status' for a quick check.") end
